ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Industry type of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when customer information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when customer information was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the customer information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact person */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the contact person belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contact person (e.g., sales, support) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when contact person information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when contact person information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when warehouse information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when warehouse information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory item is stored */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the inventory */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product in the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the product in the inventory */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity of the product in the inventory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when inventory information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when inventory information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Specifications of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when product information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when order information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when order information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when order item information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when order item information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when shipment information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when shipment information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service, warehouse manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the employee belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when employee information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when employee information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when role information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when permission information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when permission information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
